query: UPDATE tenants SET crmConnected = 'false' WHERE crmType = 'ghl' AND id NOT IN (1, 450029) AND name LIKE '%Test%' OR (id >= 840000 AND crmType = 'ghl' AND id NOT IN (1, 450029))
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute UPDATE tenants SET crmConnected = 'false' WHERE crmType = 'ghl' AND id NOT IN (1, 450029) AND name LIKE '%Test%' OR (id >= 840000 AND crmType = 'ghl' AND id NOT IN (1, 450029))
